perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young girl in a purple shirt and a woman in a grey-green shirt sit at a white table. They interact warmly. The girl plays with a pink ball. (2) The woman holds an iPhone, displaying an English learning app interface. She gestures and talks directly to the camera while sitting in a room with shelves and plush toys. (3) Screen recordings or close-ups of the smartphone show different menu options like 'Business English' and 'Scenario-based dialogue'. Fingers are seen scrolling and tapping. (4) The woman is shown in various indoor settings—sitting on the floor with plush toys, then back at the table—continuously explaining the app. (5) The video ends with the woman holding the phone showing a discount offer, followed by a final shot of the little girl smiling and playing with a yellow stuffed bear.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo background music plays. A woman's voice talks to a child; the child responds with 'steak' and 'hamburger' in English. (2) The woman's voice becomes the dominant narrator, speaking in a clear, enthusiastic, and professional tone about English learning challenges. (3) Subtle UI sound effects (clicks/swishes) accompany the on-screen text transitions. (4) The music remains consistent in the background as the woman explains app features. (5) At the end, the child's voice is heard singing 'Happy happy happy' over a playful melody as the music fades.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'steak' and 'hamburger' appear with food icons (Decorative/Hook, enthusiastic). (2) 'Speak AI 英文口說App' (Functional, informative). (3) '身為職業媽媽...' and subsequent subtitles translate the spoken Chinese narration (Functional, narrative). (4) '自由設定AI對話情境', '跟老闆的英文簡報', '模擬雅思' (Functional, feature highlights). (5) '訂閱年度會員 還有最高 $777 的折扣' and '只到 6/20' (Functional, promotional hook). (6) 'Speak 讓英文一切好說' (Functional, slogan).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Interaction with child -> Problem identification -> App demonstration and feature list -> Call to action with discount.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 adult female (mother figure) and 1 young female child.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An adult woman with dark hair tied in a ponytail wearing a grey-green button-down shirt; a young girl with pigtails wearing a purple short-sleeved top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A bright indoor environment featuring a white round table, pink soft furniture, white shelving units with colorful books, and various plush toys (clouds, bears).

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> User Pain Point -> Product Solution -> Feature Deep Dive -> Incentive/CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional endorsement for the 'Speak' AI English learning app. It targets busy working parents by demonstrating how the app can be used in 'fragmented time' to improve spoken English through AI-driven scenarios (meetings, interviews, daily life). The inclusion of a child adds a relatable 'mom influencer' touch to build trust and relevance.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The speaker directly introduces the app, demonstrates its features, and provides a specific discount offer and deadline.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Mom-influencer style, educational content for adults using lifestyle vlog aesthetics.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively bridges the gap between childcare vlogs and educational software marketing.
